prompt: A SaaS product costs $0.018 per AI action. Users average 420 actions per month. The subscription price is $12/month. Calculate monthly gross margin per user and breakeven actions per user. Return only the final calculations and one conclusion.

A document processing workflow costs $0.42 per 100 pages. A customer processes 18,000 pages per month and pays $99/month. Calculate monthly variable cost, gross margin dollars, and gross margin percentage. Return only calculations and one conclusion.
